transformationMoves: Translate magic telemetry into bodily carrier, nearby object resistance, and visible route alignment before anyone names the pattern.
Keep Muradin and cave dialogue pinned to cups, brazier heat, beard-rings, runes, bow leather, ice shards, and carry labor.
Replace portable winter-hostile phrasing with Dragonblight- and Frostmourne-specific markers already sourced by plan and memory.
Favor passage-local substitutions and short extensions over explanatory rewrites so cadence stays breakneck.

scenes.title: The Burned Shore
scenes.biggestGap: Jaina's inland read needs to stay in bread, fingers, ash, and the visible sled groove so the opener does not drift into clean signal-language.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Burned Daggercap docks, stripped shoreline camps, and the inland spoor leaving the bay.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Bread crust in Jaina's hand, ash on the wind, scorched canvas, frozen sled grooves, and pitch in the cold.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads the harbor as battlefield aftermath and judges Arthas by what he spent to leave it.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Jaina's updates land through crushed crust, stopped chewing, hand-listening, and her gaze locking to the same cut in the snow.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The formation leaves the shore in file while the Wolfheart and burned fleet remain behind as proof of no return.

scenes.title: The March
scenes.biggestGap: Dragonblight and Jaina's changing read need more contact-level proof so the march stops feeling like generic frozen hardship plus mage telemetry.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Dragonblight inland from Daggercap Bay, climbing through dead-white distance toward the dwarven stockade.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Cracking snow crust, the flask seam biting Jaina's thumb, failed cookfire remains, exposed bone, and abandoned campaign debris in ice.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas tracks pace, fatigue, flank spread, and what the land is doing to bodies and formation.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: March dialogue stays attached to drinking, breath, hand marks in the air, and visible bends in the spoor and ground.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Wall smoke and the straight timber line turn attrition into the first defensible human shape they have seen all day.

dialogueRuns.label: Jaina marks the bend toward one source

scenes.title: The Ally
scenes.biggestGap: The Muradin shelter scene needs the theorem spoken through cups, table grain, beard-rings, and visible room-read so it never turns into free-floating commentary.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Muradin's siege-worn shelter inside the iron-banded stockade, with the glacier route already governing the room.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Boiling ale, brazier heat, rough boards, cup rims, beard-rings clicking, and cold gear laid ready for immediate departure.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads Muradin as a commander by camp discipline, stance, and whether his intelligence changes their odds.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Explanation is broken against tabletop grain, spilled ale, cup heat, standing posture, and the rangers' visible response to each woman.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Gear call, gloves, and the rush out before the next meal turn the room back into pursuit.

scenes.title: Frostmourne
scenes.biggestGap: The cave and retreat need stronger contact-level proof—runes, leather, frost, failed cast angle, shard wound, carry strain—so the climax never slides back into tactical summary.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: The glacier seam, cave mouth, entry throat, and chamber where the half-ring of soldiers stands before the far wall.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Snow-scoured runes, hammer leather rimed white, rigid bow leather, shattered ice, Muradin's blood freezing at the mail seam, and harness straps cutting palms on the retreat.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads kill-lanes, failed lethality, barrier pressure, and the exact instant the fight becomes extraction.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Threshold and combat speech stays attached to soldiers turning, spell-light dying short, boots on ice, impact lanes, and carry orders.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: All-seven extraction, Light's Vengeance abandoned in the drift, and Jaina still tracing the seam with numb fingers on the run downhill.
